title: austrodanthonia acerosa
intro: Austrodanthonia acerosa, also known as Rough Danthonia, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Austrodanthonia acerosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Austrodanthonia acerosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
